title: Rubio: Good News On Iran Could Come Later Today
snippet: Secretary of State Rubio stated there has been 'significant progress' in Iran negotiations and suggested 'good news in hours,' signaling imminent developments in the deal process.
tag_reason: 신규 — 루비오 국무장관이 이란 협상에서 '상당한 진전'과 '몇 시간 내 좋은 소식'을 예고한 발언 보도
